q-import { ../q-components/q-tree-view.qhtml?v=tree-css-15 } q-model my-tree { q-map { src: q-array { "index.js", "parser.js", q-map { utils: q-array { "path.js", "net.js" } } } docs: q-array { "README.md", "MODULE-API.md" } } } q-style tree-marker-open-style { backgroundColor: #22c55e color: #ffffff borderColor: #15803d } q-style tree-marker-closed-style { backgroundColor: #2563eb color: #ffffff borderColor: #1d4ed8 } q-style tree-connector-style { color: #60a5fa } q-theme tree-demo-theme { .q-tree-marker-open { tree-marker-open-style } .q-tree-marker-closed { tree-marker-closed-style } .q-tree-connector { tree-connector-style } } style { .q-tree-marker-open { background: #22c55e; color: #ffffff; border-color: #15803d; } } style { .q-tree-marker-closed { background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; border-color: #1d4ed8; } } style { .q-tree-connector { color: #60a5fa; border-left-color: currentColor; } } tree-demo-theme { q-tree-view#my-view { model: "my-tree" } }
